name: solo-npm
description: Seven skills for AI-driven solo-dev npm publishing — covering the full lifecycle. Bootstrap: /solo-npm:init scaffolds release.yml + publishConfig + .nvmrc + consumer wrappers + .claude/settings.json (idempotent); /solo-npm:trust configures OIDC Trusted Publishing across packages via the npm-trust CLI. Per-release: /solo-npm:release drives tag-triggered publishing with one approval gate; /solo-npm:verify runs lint + typecheck + test + build. Portfolio operations: /solo-npm:status shows a one-page dashboard; /solo-npm:audit runs security audit with risk triage; /solo-npm:deps orchestrates dep upgrades with verify gates. Release and verify are designed to be wrapped per-repo via .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md thin wrappers.
